Property Highlights

Everything You'd Expect from North Shore Living

Nestled on East Island in Glen Cove, this beautifully maintained home blends classic elegance with an unbeatable location — steps from the Long Island Sound with views of the NYC skyline.

🪟

Floor-to-Ceiling Windows

Dramatic windows in the sunlit kitchen flood every room with natural light and frame beautiful outdoor views throughout the day.

🔥

Elegant Fireplace

The inviting family room centers around a stunning marble fireplace — the perfect gathering space for every season.

🏗️

Built-In 2-Car Garage

Integrated garage provides convenient, covered parking plus additional storage — a rare find on East Island.

🌿

Expansive Deck

Glass doors open from the family room to a spacious outdoor deck overlooking 0.65 acres of lush, private grounds with room for a pool.

🌊

Across from Long Island Sound

Private community access to beaches, boat launches, and fishing — right across the street. NYC skyline views included.

🏡

Basement + Future Potential

Full unfinished basement offers 574 sq ft of abundant storage and untapped potential — expand, finish, or customize.

Photo Tour

Inside 13 Westland Drive

East Island · Glen Cove

The Lifestyle That Comes With This Address

East Island — formerly known as Morgan's Island — is one of Long Island's most coveted North Shore communities. Your new home puts this lifestyle right at your doorstep.

🏖️
Private Beach Access
Exclusive community beach access directly across the street — morning walks, swimming, and sunset views over the Sound.
⛵
Boating & Water Sports
Community boat launches and fishing right from the neighborhood. Long Island Sound at your fingertips year-round.
🌆
NYC Skyline Views
Wake up to stunning water views and catch the New York City skyline on clear days — from your own backyard.
⛳
Golf, Parks & Dining
Nearby golf courses, Morgan Memorial Park, waterfront dining, boutique shopping, and top-rated Glen Cove schools.
🚆
Easy NYC Commute
LIRR Glen Cove station provides a direct, comfortable commute to Manhattan — the best of both worlds.
